title: sunania filiformis
side_effects: Sunania filiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. Improper use of Sunania filiformis may also cause interactions with certain medications, potentially exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure or diabetes. Furthermore, long-term exposure to the plant's potent compounds can contribute to liver damage and kidney strain.
